title: Two more icebreakers to be homeported in Alaska
summary: Alaska’s congressional delegation on Thursday announced that two additional U.S. Coast Guard icebreakers will be homeported in the state, a move officials say will bolster national security, expand Arctic operations and bring new economic activity to coastal communities.

title: Nun — the life giving light of God’s word
